category_sources: source_facts.description identifies the project as a modern hash identification system; official README describes identifying hash types.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository README uses the Name That Hash/Name-That-Hash branding; source_facts.name is name-that-hash.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official web app/documentation surface; official README links its Wiki under Documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; the official GitHub repository is linked by official project materials and HashPals/Name-That-Hash redirects to bee-san/Name-That-Hash.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it is a hash identification system; official README topics include security, hashing, infosec, and CTF use.
